question: Based on this annual marketing campaign performance chart (as of February 2024), which statement best reflects what we can infer about the latest year?

options.A: All channels clearly performed much worse in the latest year than in previous years.
options.B: The latest year’s data only cover an early part of the year, so we cannot draw conclusions about its full performance.
options.C: Traditional Media has become the dominant driver of ROI in the latest year.
options.D: The latest year confirms that the overall marketing strategy has failed across all channels.

explanation: The latest year includes only about 2 months of data, whereas earlier bars represent full-year totals. Stacking the partial-year totals next to full-year bars makes the latest year look dramatically worse across all channels, but this is a consequence of inappropriate aggregation of time, not a true performance collapse.
